CustomField.label: BiOp Reinit: Take Exceeded
CustomField.description: ESA §7 BiOp reinitiation trigger per 50 CFR §402.16(a)(2). When checked by a field inspector, NEPA_BiOp_Reinitiation_Checker fires and creates a High-priority ESA Coordinator Task if an active BiOp exists on the parent IndividualApplication. Also adds +12 pts to nepa_challenge_risk_delta__c.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: [50 CFR §402.16(a)(2)] Amount or extent of take specified in incidental take statement exceeded. Field detection: Field inspection: count dead/injured individuals; compare to ITS threshold
